category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT devices (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular IoT) exported from China to Iceland. Iceland is NOT an EU member state but IS an EEA member; the EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED 2014/53/EU) applies in Iceland via the EEA Agreement and is enforced by PFS (Post og Fjarskipti — Icelandic Post and Telecom, the National Regulatory Authority for telecommunications and radio). CE marking is mandatory as in the EU. Electrical product safety is overseen by Neytendastofa (Consumer Agency of Iceland). Iceland has its own customs regime (Tollstjóri — Directorate of Customs) despite EEA membership — goods crossing from EU to Iceland go through Icelandic customs and are subject to VSK (Virðisaukaskattur, Icelandic VAT, 24%).

title.en: China-to-Iceland Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入冰岛：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入冰島：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Icelandic market requirements under the EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED 2014/53/EU), adopted into Icelandic law via the EEA Agreement and enforced by PFS (Post og Fjarskipti — Icelandic Post and Telecom, the National Regulatory Authority). Covers CE marking, radio performance (EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 with 5 GHz DFS/LBT — PFS spectrum monitoring), EMC (EN 301 489 series), electrical safety (EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11, 230 V/50 Hz, plug C/F, Neytendastofa oversight), cybersecurity (RED Art. 3.3 mandatory from 1 August 2025 via EN 18031; EU CRA alignment expected in Iceland), EEA/EU Authorised Representative (EU AR does not automatically cover Iceland — EEA mandate required), Icelandic-language labelling, WEEE registration via Íslenski rafgeymirinn, and Icelandic customs (Tollstjóri) procedures.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与冰岛市场要求（依据欧盟无线设备指令RED 2014/53/EU，通过欧洲经济区协议纳入冰岛法律，由PFS——冰岛邮政和电信局，国家监管机构——在国内执行）的差距对照。涵盖CE标志、无线电性能（EN 300 328 / EN 301 893，含5 GHz DFS/LBT——PFS频谱监测）、电磁兼容（EN 301 489系列）、电气安全（EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11，230 V/50 Hz，C/F型插头，Neytendastofa监管）、网络安全（RED第3.3条，2025年8月1日起通过EN 18031强制执行；冰岛预期与欧盟CRA对齐）、EEA/欧盟授权代表（欧盟授权代表不自动覆盖冰岛——须取得EEA授权）、冰岛语标签、通过Íslenski rafgeymirinn进行WEEE注册及冰岛海关（Tollstjóri）手续。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與冰島市場要求（依據歐盟無線設備指令RED 2014/53/EU，通過歐洲經濟區協議納入冰島法律，由PFS——冰島郵政和電信局，國家監管機構——在國內執行）的差距對照。涵蓋CE標誌、無線電性能（EN 300 328 / EN 301 893，含5 GHz DFS/LBT——PFS頻譜監測）、電磁相容（EN 301 489系列）、電氣安全（EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11，230 V/50 Hz，C/F型插頭，Neytendastofa監管）、網路安全（RED第3.3條，2025年8月1日起通過EN 18031強制執行；冰島預期與歐盟CRA對齊）、EEA/歐盟授權代表（歐盟授權代表不自動覆蓋冰島——須取得EEA授權）、冰島語標籤、通過Íslenski rafgeymirinn進行WEEE登記及冰島海關（Tollstjóri）手續。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Icelandic and EEA law, harmonised standards, PFS guidance, and applicable customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行冰岛及欧洲经济区法律、协调标准、PFS指导意见及适用的海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行冰島及歐洲經濟區法律、協調標準、PFS指導意見及適用的海關要求。

answer_first.en: Iceland is an EEA member — not an EU member — but the EU Radio Equipment Directive (RED 2014/53/EU) applies in Iceland via the EEA Agreement, and CE marking is mandatory, enforced by PFS (Post og Fjarskipti — Icelandic Post and Telecom, the National Regulatory Authority). Key gaps versus Chinese SRRC/CCC include: radio performance testing to EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 (with 5 GHz DFS requirements — PFS is responsible for spectrum monitoring and enforcement), EMC to EN 301 489 series, electrical safety to EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 (230 V/50 Hz, plug type C/F, Neytendastofa oversight), cybersecurity under RED Art. 3.3(d)–(f) via EN 18031 (mandatory from 1 August 2025), EEA/EU Authorised Representative (an EU AR covering only EU member states does NOT automatically cover Iceland — EEA coverage must be explicit or a separate Iceland/EEA AR must be appointed), Icelandic-language labelling for consumer products, WEEE registration via Íslenski rafgeymirinn, and Icelandic customs clearance via Tollstjóri and VSK (24%) despite EEA membership. CCC and FCC are not recognised in Iceland.
answer_first.zh: 冰岛是欧洲经济区成员——而非欧盟成员——但欧盟无线设备指令（RED 2014/53/EU）通过欧洲经济区协议在冰岛适用，CE标志为强制要求，由PFS（冰岛邮政和电信局，国家监管机构）执行。与中国SRRC/CCC相比，主要差距包括：按EN 300 328 / EN 301 893进行无线电性能检测（含5 GHz DFS要求——PFS负责频谱监测和执法）、按EN 301 489系列进行电磁兼容检测、按EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11进行电气安全检测（230 V/50 Hz，C/F型插头，Neytendastofa监管）、通过EN 18031履行RED第3.3(d)–(f)条网络安全义务（2025年8月1日起强制执行）、委任EEA/欧盟授权代表（仅覆盖欧盟成员国的欧盟授权代表不自动覆盖冰岛——授权委托须明确涵盖欧洲经济区，或须另行委任冰岛/欧洲经济区代表）、提供消费品冰岛语标签、通过Íslenski rafgeymirinn进行WEEE注册，以及尽管拥有欧洲经济区成员身份仍须通过Tollstjóri完成冰岛海关通关并缴纳VSK（24%）。CCC和FCC在冰岛不被认可。
answer_first.zht: 冰島是歐洲經濟區成員——而非歐盟成員——但歐盟無線設備指令（RED 2014/53/EU）通過歐洲經濟區協議在冰島適用，CE標誌為強制要求，由PFS（冰島郵政和電信局，國家監管機構）執行。與中國SRRC/CCC相比，主要差距包括：按EN 300 328 / EN 301 893進行無線電性能檢測（含5 GHz DFS要求——PFS負責頻譜監測和執法）、按EN 301 489系列進行電磁相容檢測、按EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11進行電氣安全檢測（230 V/50 Hz，C/F型插頭，Neytendastofa監管）、通過EN 18031履行RED第3.3(d)–(f)條網路安全義務（2025年8月1日起強制執行）、委任EEA/歐盟授權代表（僅覆蓋歐盟成員國的歐盟授權代表不自動覆蓋冰島——授權委託須明確涵蓋歐洲經濟區，或須另行委任冰島/歐洲經濟區代表）、提供消費品冰島語標籤、通過Íslenski rafgeymirinn進行WEEE登記，以及儘管擁有歐洲經濟區成員資格仍須通過Tollstjóri完成冰島海關通關並繳納VSK（24%）。CCC和FCC在冰島不被認可。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. PFS, EUR-Lex, ETSI, Neytendastofa, and Umhverfisstofnun are preferred primary sources.
